title: 2007 Press Releases
summary: This is a Federal Reserve website listing page containing an index of press releases from calendar year 2007. It is a navigation/aggregation page, not an individual source document, and does not contain substantive research or analysis. The page references numerous FOMC statements, Term Auction Facility announcements, regulatory actions, and banking applications from 2007.
key_points: This is a listing page/index, not an archiveable individual source document
Contains references to multiple FOMC statements from 2007 (dates: 12/11, 10/31, 9/18)
References multiple Term Auction Facility (TAF) credit auctions of $20 billion
References central bank coordination announcement on 12/12/2007 addressing short-term funding pressures
References Basel II final rules implementation (11/2/2007) and various regulatory actions
Source is from 2007 - approximately 19 years old relative to TODAY (2026-03-31)
why_it_matters: This listing page itself is not directly usable for research. The individual press releases it references (FOMC statements, TAF operations, regulatory actions) may be separately archiveable and relevant to market structure and macro catalysts during the 2007 financial crisis period.
macro_context: The page references several items from the 2007 period relevant to macro catalysts: FOMC statements (October 31, September 18, December 11, 2007), TAF auctions responding to funding market stress, and a 12/12/2007 coordinated central bank announcement addressing short-term funding pressures. However, this listing page does not contain the substantive content of these individual releases.
market_structure_context: This listing page references Term Auction Facility (TAF) operations from 2007, which were market structure interventions during the financial crisis. The page also references Basel II implementation rules and various discount rate actions, which relate to banking/financial system structure.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source metadata - explicitly non-archivable per Rule 5
Source URL is blank - violates source attribution requirement (name + url must be present)
No substantive content - only an index of press release titles and dates
Event type set to 'unknown' but the page itself has no inherent event type (listing page)
The individual referenced items (FOMC statements, TAF announcements) are not contained in this source
Source is ~19 years old with no substantive content to warrant archival value

notes: Non-archivable listing page. This is a Federal Reserve website index page from 2007 containing references to press releases rather than substantive research content. The page type is listing_page per source metadata guidance, which should be treated as non-archiveable. Individual referenced items (FOMC statements, TAF operations, regulatory announcements) from this 2007 period would be more appropriate for separate archival if they contain substantive content relevant to market structure or macro catalysts.
